title: gonocitrus angulatus
intro: Gonocitrus angulatus, also known as the Chinese turpentine tree, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its aromatic bark and resinous sap. The medicinal properties of Gonocitrus angulatus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of using Gonocitrus angulatus include relieving coughs and colds, reducing fever, and treating wounds and skin irritations. In traditional Chinese medicine, Gonocitrus angulatus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal properties and used for its health benefits.
